businessQuestion: Which promotions generated the highest ROI?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DPROM.PROMOTION_NAME,
    SUM(FPP.PROMO_MARGIN_AMT) AS PROMO_MARGIN,
    SUM(FPP.BASELINE_MARGIN_AMT) AS BASELINE_MARGIN,
    ROUND(
        SUM(FPP.PROMO_MARGIN_AMT) /
        NULLIF(SUM(FPP.BASELINE_MARGIN_AMT),0),2
    ) AS ROI
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_PROMOTION_PERFORMANCE FPP
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PROMOTION DPROM
ON FPP.PROMOTION_KEY=DPROM.PROMOTION_KEY
GROUP BY DPROM.PROMOTION_NAME
ORDER BY ROI DESC;
businessContext: Marketing leadership wants to focus future investments on campaigns with the highest return.
